name: finwise-ai
description: FinWise AI - Intelligent Loan Eligibility, Credit Analysis & Financial Advisory Platform

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm --prefix apps/api run dev" "npm --prefix apps/web run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix apps/api run build && npm --prefix apps/web run build
scripts.lint: npm --prefix apps/api run lint && npm --prefix apps/web run lint
scripts.test: npm --prefix apps/api run test && npm --prefix apps/web run test
